mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORGDEPTMASTER01 ( COMPANY, DEPT_CODE, DEPT_NAME, PARENT_DEPT, DEPT_LEADER, DEPT_CATEGORY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{deptCode}, #{deptName}, NULLIF(#{parentDept}, ''), NULLIF(#{deptLeader}, ''), NULLIF(#{deptCategory}, ''), NULLIF(#{workPatternCode}, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.select: SELECT d.COMPANY AS company, d.DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, d.PARENT_DEPT AS parentDept, p.DEPT_NAME AS parentDeptName, d.DEPT_LEADER AS deptLeader, e.EMP_NAME AS deptLeaderName, d.DEPT_CATEGORY AS deptCategory, d.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AS workPatternCode, d.USE_YN AS useYn FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 d LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 p ON d.COMPANY = p.COMPANY AND d.PARENT_DEPT = p.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRIMASTER01 e ON d.COMPANY = e.COMPANY AND d.DEPT_LEADER = e.EMP_CODE WHERE d.COMPANY = #{company} ORDER BY d.DEPT_CODE

SELECT COMPANY AS company, EMP_CODE AS empCode, EMP_NAME AS empName, DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, ROLE_CODE AS roleCode FROM HRIMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} ORDER BY EMP_CODE

SELECT COMPANY AS company, DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName, PARENT_DEPT AS parentDept, DEPT_LEADER AS deptLeader, DEPT_CATEGORY AS deptCategory, WORK_PATTERN_CODE AS workPatternCode, USE_YN AS useYn FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE ORGDEPTMASTER01 SET DEPT_NAME = #{deptName}, PARENT_DEPT = NULLIF(#{parentDept}, ''), OLD_DEPT_LEADER = CASE WHEN DEPT_LEADER != #{deptLeader} THEN DEPT_LEADER ELSE OLD_DEPT_LEADER END, DEPT_LEADER = NULLIF(#{deptLeader}, ''), DEPT_CATEGORY = NULLIF(#{deptCategory}, ''), WORK_PATTERN_CODE = NULLIF(#{workPatternCode}, ''), USE_YN = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode}
